violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Door sweep to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

Several products of nitrous oxide were available for retail sale on the retail floor. Some of the nitrous oxide product stated "not for distribution for retail sale." Product was placed under embargo. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The floor in the walk-in area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
